description_long: This is a round, earthenware vase with a wide, open mouth and a single sturdy handle attached to one side. The body is bulbous and smoothly transitions into a slightly flared rim, giving it a classic, utilitarian appearance. The surface is matte and unglazed, with a natural, reddish-brown clay color and subtle textural variations that suggest handcrafting. The handle is thick and robust, seamlessly integrated into the body, allowing for easy gripping and transport. There are no visible decorative motifs or embellishments, emphasizing its rustic and functional design. The interior appears hollow and spacious, suitable for holding water, plants, or other contents.
description: A round, reddish-brown clay vase with a wide mouth and a single thick handle, featuring a matte, unadorned surface and a rustic, handcrafted look.
description_view_0: The vase is shown from an angle highlighting the wide mouth and the prominent handle on the left side.
description_view_1: The vase is viewed directly from the front, showing the open mouth and the symmetrical, rounded body with the handle barely visible at the back.
description_view_2: The vase is seen from the opposite side, with the handle now on the right, emphasizing the smooth, continuous curve of the body.
description_view_3: The vase is viewed from the back, with the handle centered and fully visible, showing its attachment to the rim and body.
